resultList.dtldesc: A well-planned 2 BHK apartment is available for sale in the modern residential project Aparna Sarovar Zicon located in Nallagandla. Developed by Aparna Constructions and Estates Pvt. Ltd., this gated community offers contemporary high-rise living along with access to premium lifestyle amenities. The property is suitable for families and professionals seeking a comfortable home in one of Hyderabad’s rapidly developing residential corridors.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment offers a carpet area of 844 sq. ft and is situated on the 20th floor of a 26-storey residential tower, providing pleasant views and ample natural light. The layout includes two bedrooms and two bathrooms, designed for comfortable and practical living. The apartment is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences.::::The home features well-planned living spaces that ensure good ventilation and natural illumination throughout the day. As part of a newly constructed residential development, the apartment is ready to move, making it suitable for buyers looking for immediate occupancy or long-term investment.::::Facilities::::Residents of the community benefit from a wide range of modern facilities designed to enhance lifestyle and convenience. The development features modern lifestyle amenities, including a clubhouse and landscaped gardens, delivering a premium residential experience.::::Locality::::Located opposite Yashoda Hospital in Izzathnagar, the property enjoys excellent proximity to healthcare, educational institutions, supermarkets, banks, and public transport facilities, all within approximately 1 km. The area is well connected to major commercial hubs and IT corridors of Hyderabad. Combining impressive height, expansive interiors, and a prime address, this apartment presents an exceptional opportunity for discerning homebuyers seeking upscale urban living.
